CreateAppBlb.clientToken: Idempotency token, no more than 64 characters.
CreateAppBlb.name: Name of the LoadBalancer for easy identification. Length 1–65 bytes, must start with a letter, may contain letters, digits, and -\_/. characters. Auto-generated if not provided.
CreateAppBlb.type: Specifies the load balancer instance type. Defaults to application type if not provided; pass "ipv6Application" to create an IPv6 application-type BLB.
CreateAppBlb.desc: Description of the LoadBalancer instance for additional details. Length 0–450 bytes, supports Chinese characters. Defaults to empty.
CreateAppBlb.subnetId: Subnet to which the LoadBalancer instance belongs.
CreateAppBlb.vpcId: vpcShortId of the VPC to which the LoadBalancer instance VIP belongs.
CreateAppBlb.address: Private IP address assigned to the load balancer instance. Must fall within the subnet CIDR range.
CreateAppBlb.eip: Bind an existing EIP. Value is the IP address of the EIP.
CreateAppBlb.tags: List of tag key-value pairs to be created.
CreateAppBlb.tags.tagKey: Tag key. May contain uppercase/lowercase letters, digits, Chinese characters, and -\_ /. special characters. Length 1–65.
CreateAppBlb.tags.tagValue: Tag value. May contain uppercase/lowercase letters, digits, Chinese characters, and -\_ /. special characters. Length 0–65.
CreateAppBlb.billing: Order information. Required when purchasing a prepaid blb.
CreateAppBlb.billing.paymentTiming: Payment timing. Prepaid (Prepaid) or postpaid (Postpaid). Currently only prepaid is supported.
CreateAppBlb.billing.billingMethod: Billing method for postpaid instances. "BySpec" for fixed specification, "ByCapacityUnit" for usage-based billing.
CreateAppBlb.billing.reservation: Reservation information. Not required for postpaid; must be set for prepaid.
CreateAppBlb.performanceLevel: Performance specification. Defaults to shared. Valid values: "small1" Standard 1, "small2" Standard 2, "medium1" Enhanced 1, "medium2" Enhanced 2, "large1" Ultra-large 1, "large2" Ultra-large 2, "large3" Ultra-large 3. "unlimited" (no speed limit) is also available for postpaid usage-based billing.
CreateAppBlb.autoRenewLength: Enables auto-renewal when creating a prepaid blb. Valid range depends on autoRenewTimeUnit: 1–9 for month, 1–3 for year.
CreateAppBlb.autoRenewTimeUnit: Time unit for auto-renewal when creating a blb. Valid values: "month" or "year" (default: "month").
CreateAppBlb.resourceGroupId: Resource group ID to bind when creating the blb.
CreateAppBlb.allowDelete: Whether deletion is allowed. Defaults to true, meaning deletion is permitted.
CreateAppBlb.allowModify: Defaults to false, meaning modification protection is disabled and instance changes via the console are allowed. Set to true to enable modification protection and prohibit console-based changes (note: OpenAPI calls are not restricted).
CreateAppBlb.modificationProtectionReason: Reason for disallowing modification. Supports up to 128 characters.
CreateAppBlb.allocateIpv6: Whether to allocate an IPv6 address. true to allocate, false to skip.
